message:
feat(storage): recognize Johnson-Lindenstrauss embedders as hash embedders

Add JL_EMBEDDER_PREFIX ("jl-") constant and extend is_hash_embedder()
to recognize JL-prefixed embedder IDs as hash embedders in both the job
queue and indexing pipeline. This ensures Johnson-Lindenstrauss random
projection embedders receive the same treatment as FNV1a hash embedders
throughout the storage layer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
